raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wisch gannihê fawn
ɡannamu Pułku ka weens Gans/
wisch fapulzinahs tohs Jehrus
tawâs Rohkâs/ un neſſihs fa-
wâ Klehpi/ un weddihs weegli-
nain tahs gruhtas Awju Mah-
tes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kaß mehro to Uhdeni ar
tawu Duhri/ un irr to Debbes
Mehru ar weenu Spridi neh-
mis/ un faturr tohs Semmes
Pihſchlus ar treju (Piçsto)
Mehru / un irr tohs Kalnus
fwehris ar Swarru / un tohs
Pakainus Swarru-Kausâ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kaß irr ta KUNGA
Garru pamabzijs/ un kaß irr
winna Padohmu-Dewejs / kaß
winnam Sinnatchanu mahzije?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ar ko irr wisch Padoh-
mu turrejs / kaß winnam Sa-
prafchanu dohtu/un winnu mah-
zitu tahs Teefas Zettu? un mah-
zitu winnam Atsibfchann/ un
darritu winnam finnamu fa-
prattigas Leetas?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Redſt/ tee Landis irr ka
kahda Lahta weenâ Spanni/
un ka kahds Pihſchlitis Swar-
ru-Kausâ / rangi/ wisch ap-
gahsch tahs Sallas ka fmalkus
Pihſchlus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Libbanus ne buh-
tu gann par Dedſinafchanu/ un
winna Swehri ne buhtu gann
par winna Dedſamo-Uppuweem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſſas Tautas irr
neneeka preceſch winna/ un t
pee winna par neneeku un ne-
rigas turretas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kurram juhs to ST
RII DEEWU lihdsinafeet?
kahdu Lihdsibu juhs winn
gribbat taiſibt?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Gann tas Amatta-Wi
leij weennu Bildi/ un tas S
rab-Kallejs pahrwelk to ar
S
ta/ un peeletj Sudraba Sch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kaß nabbags irr/
neneeka pee Rohkas uppure
tas iswehle weennu Rohkn /
ne fatruhd / wisch mekle
weenu gudruMeisteri weenn
di taiſibt/ kaß ne fchaubahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Woj juhs to ne finn
woj juhs to ne dsirdat? woj
jums no Gefahkuma ne irr fi-
sihts? neggi juhs to effat
prattuschi/ kamehr ta Semm-
dibbinata?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wisch irr kaß fehsch p
to Semmes Wirfu/ un win
Eedsihwotaji irr ka Si-
Wisch irr kas tahs Debbefis-
platta ka tmaleu Palagu/ uu
plesch tahs ka Telti kur
dsihwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kaß tohs Leel-Kun
par neneeku darra / un
Sennnes-Sobgus par
leetibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Itt ka ne buhtu tee
ftiti nedß fehti/ ir winnu Ze-
ne faknojis Semmê / bet
wisch us teem puhtihß/ tad
no
"
    }
  ],

  "notes": ""
